Control input & $\omega_{cmd}$ & Yaw-rate command & control input & rad/s \\
Slope variable & $\theta$ & True road slope angle & model variable & rad \\

% ===== Table 2 =====
\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{LPV-MPC settings and constraints used in the closed-loop simulations.}
\label{tab:mpc_settings}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\hline
Item & Symbol & Value & Unit / Description \\
\hline
Sampling time & $T_s$ & 0.0100 & s \\
Prediction horizon & $N_p$ & 160 & 1.60 s \\
Control horizon & $N_c$ & 60 & 0.60 s \\
Tracking weight & $Q$ & diag(15.293, 28.737, 5.076, 2.9918) & $e_y,e_\psi,e_v,e_\omega$ \\
Input weight & $R$ & diag(0.001, 0.001) & $F_{cmd},\omega_{cmd}$ \\
Input-increment weight & $R_{\Delta}$ & diag(0.01, 0.01) & $\Delta F_{cmd},\Delta \omega_{cmd}$ \\
Input constraint & $F_{cmd}$ & $[-600,600]$ & N \\
Input constraint & $\omega_{cmd}$ & $[-1.2,1.2]$ & rad/s \\
Input-increment constraint & $\Delta F_{cmd}$ & $[-400,400]$ & N/step \\
Input-increment constraint & $\Delta\omega_{cmd}$ & $[-0.9,0.9]$ & (rad/s)/step \\
Output soft constraint & $e_y$ & $[-1.0,1.0]$ & m, ECR $3\times10^3$ \\
Output soft constraint & $e_\psi$ & $[-0.5,0.5]$ & rad, ECR $3\times10^3$ \\
Implementation & Solver & MATLAB MPC Toolbox & Adaptive MPC with online model update \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}

% ===== Table 3 =====
\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Temporal perception input window and multi-task output definition.}
\label{tab:temporal_input}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{0.16\textwidth}p{0.16\textwidth}p{0.22\textwidth}p{0.38\textwidth}@{}}
\hline
Component & Symbol / Setting & Value & Description \\
\hline
Input window & $L$ & 128 & Historical samples \\
Input dimension & $F$ & 19 & Observable features \\
Sampling time & $T_s$ & 0.0100 & s \\
Window duration & $LT_s$ & 1.28 & s \\
Input tensor & $Z_k$ & $\mathbb{R}^{128\times 19}$ & Train-set-normalized window \\
Normalization & Scaler & train-only scaler & fit\_train\_only\_apply\_val\_test\_online \\
Split policy & Split & run-level split & run\_level\_no\_window\_leakage \\
Feature categories & Inputs & 19 named features & Acceleration, yaw rate, steering, wheel speed, current, velocity, pitch, and derived diagnostics \\
Main-condition task & Head 1 & flat / stall / slope & Auxiliary classification output \\
Steering-direction task & Head 2 & right / straight / left & Auxiliary classification output \\
Slope regression task & Head 3 & $\hat{\theta}_k$ & Processed by $S(\cdot)$ before scheduling \\
Control interface & $\theta_k^{sch}$ & LPV-MPC scheduler input & Network does not directly output $F_{cmd}$ or $\omega_{cmd}$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}

% ===== Table 4 =====
\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Model configurations of GRU, TCN, and ModernTCN.}
\label{tab:model_configs}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{0.09\textwidth}p{0.17\textwidth}p{0.28\textwidth}p{0.06\textwidth}p{0.11\textwidth}p{0.09\textwidth}p{0.13\textwidth}@{}}
\hline
Model & Temporal encoder & Main configuration & Kernel & Causal & Parameters & Output heads \\
\hline
GRU & 2-layer GRU & hidden=96; pooling=last\_mean\_inputstats; dropout=0.20 & -- & No & 97,347 & main / turn / slope \\
TCN & Causal dilated Conv1D & filters=96; blocks=6; dropout=0.15 & 3 & causal & 154,467 & main / turn / slope \\
ModernTCN & Depthwise large-kernel Conv1D & channels=64; blocks=5; expansion=2; dropout=0.15 & 31 & same & 115,907 & main / turn / slope \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}

% ===== Table 5 =====
\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Baseline controllers and estimators used for closed-loop comparison.}
\label{tab:baseline_definitions}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\hline
Category & Method & Scheduled slope source & Role \\
\hline
No-slope baseline & LPV-MPC theta0 & $\theta_k^{sch}=0$ & Nominal zero-slope scheduling \\
Sensor baseline & LPV-MPC IMU theta & $\theta_k^{sch}=\theta_k^{imu}$ & Simplified sensor-based scheduling \\
Oracle baseline & LPV-MPC oracle theta & $\theta_k^{sch}=\theta_k^{true}$ & True-slope scheduling upper bound \\
Learning baseline & GRU & $\theta_k^{sch}=S(\hat{\theta}_k^{GRU})$ & Recurrent temporal estimator \\
Learning baseline & TCN & $\theta_k^{sch}=S(\hat{\theta}_k^{TCN})$ & Conventional convolutional estimator \\
Proposed method & ModernTCN & $\theta_k^{sch}=S(\hat{\theta}_k^{ModernTCN})$ & Multi-task temporal scheduling estimator \\
Ablation & Causal ModernTCN & $\theta_k^{sch}=S(\hat{\theta}_k^{causal})$ & Offline--closed-loop mismatch analysis \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}
